rows.label: xs33600100_MSG0010
rows.name:
Well, what a coincidence. What are
you doing in a place like this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33600100_MSG0020
rows.name: [ST:wide ]—I'm joking. I knew you would come for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33600100_MSG0040
rows.name:
The best thing to do with a job that doesn't
pay is to finish it as quickly as possible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33600100_MSG0050
rows.name:
I've got a lot of stress built up, so I'm
going to let loose as much as I want.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33600100_MSG0060
rows.name:
You better make sure you
keep up with me, okay?[ST:wait ]
